summary: Iteration 229 - ConsciousnessPanel Interactive Widget Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 12 interactions verified working. The 'dead' ConsciousnessPanel widget is now fully interactive with navigation, quick actions, level map, settings, and activity toggle.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key: Hold4' - duplicate key in React component

critical_code_review_comments: ConsciousnessPanel.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ConsciousnessPanel.js: LEVEL_ROUTES mapping correctly routes level nodes to appropriate pages
ConsciousnessPanel.js: QUICK_ACTIONS array properly defines 4 quick XP actions with navigation paths
ConsciousnessPanel.js: handleLevelClick correctly shows toast for locked levels with XP requirement
consciousness.py: All endpoints return proper response structures with required fields
consciousness.py: ACTIVITY_XP dict correctly awards XP for valid activities (breathing_session=10, mood_log=10, etc.)
Minor: Breathing page has duplicate React key warning for 'Hold4' - not blocking but should be fixed
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user at Level 2 with 620+ XP
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 229 verified the ConsciousnessPanel widget is fully interactive: (1) Header click -> /mastery-avenues. (2) Level 1 node -> /breathing. (3) Level 2 node -> /mood-tracker. (4) Locked levels (3,4,5) show toast with XP requirement. (5) Quick actions (Breathe, Mood, Journal, Meditate) navigate to respective pages. (6) Settings gear opens display mode picker (rank/aura/hybrid). (7) Next level preview -> /mastery-avenues. (8) Recent XP toggle shows activity history. Test user is at Level 2 (Emotional) with 620+ XP. Trial graduation overlay appears on login - dismiss with 'Continue with free plan'. Auto-Compose regression test passed.

consciousness_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/consciousness/status returns level, xp_total, all_levels, recent_activity, level_info, progress_pct

consciousness_progress_endpoint.details: POST /api/consciousness/progress awards XP for valid activities (breathing_session=10 XP)

consciousness_display_mode_endpoint.details: POST /api/consciousness/display-mode changes and persists display mode (rank/aura/hybrid)

consciousness_gate_check_endpoint.details: GET /api/consciousness/gate-check/{feature} returns unlock status with required_level

header_navigation.details: Clicking consciousness panel header navigates to /mastery-avenues

locked_level_toast.details: Clicking locked Level 3 shows toast: 'Mental unlocks at 1500 XP - AI Forge & Trade Circle'

settings_display_mode_picker.details: Settings gear opens display mode picker with rank/aura/hybrid options

next_level_preview_navigation.details: Next level preview link navigates to /mastery-avenues

recent_xp_toggle.details: Recent XP toggle expands to show activity history

auto_compose_regression.details: AI Mantra DJ Auto-Compose still working (regression from iteration 228)
